nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord; he did not turn away from all the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, with which he made Israel sin, but he walked in them.

esv.text: He also did what was evil in the sight of the Lord. He did not depart from all the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin, but he walked in them.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，不轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的一切罪，仍然行在罪中。

ccb.text: 他做耶和华视为恶的事，一如既往地犯罪，没有离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人犯的那些罪。
